people.name: Isaac Lebwohl-Steiner
people.title: Board Chair
people.bio: Lifelong ECRS attendee. Leads improv, cooperative games, and theater activities. Emphasizes community connection and play.

people.name: Catherine Woods
people.title: Board Member
people.bio: Daughter of long-time members, leads crafts and dance classes. Works as an urban farmer in Chicago with her partner Alice.

people.name: Fern Lox
people.title: Board Member
people.bio: ECRS member for 25+ years. Retired from K-12 education career as teacher, staff developer, and administrator.

people.name: Judi Powers
people.title: Board Member
people.bio: 10+ year member. Blue belt in NIA and certified Moving to Heal instructor. Licensed Adirondack guide living in the mountains.
